text: Today we are ranking Rice Cakes as a grain, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.
fat is 3g. omega 3 is kind of ridiculous.
carbs is 81.5g. glycemic index and starch stand out most.
protein is 7g. bioavailability is kind of absurd.
vitamin e at 1% DV stand out most.
magnesium at 13% DV, iron at 7% DV stand out most.
biggest pros: portable and convenient. easy to portion and carry. works with many toppings.
biggest cons: weak grain-category payoff. glycemic impact is harsh. not very filling for the calories.
Rice Cakes is D tier. Rice Cakes lands at 21 overall.
